item.title: Comment policy
item.description:
Welcome to Game and code! We’re thrilled to have you as part of our community. Our goal is to create a respectful and engaging environment where everyone can share their thoughts and ideas. To ensure a positive experience for all, please read and abide by our Comment Policy:

  1. Respectful and Constructive Communication:

    • Be respectful and considerate of others’ opinions, even if you disagree.
    • Avoid personal attacks, hate speech, or any form of discrimination, including but not limited to race, religion, gender, sexual orientation, or nationality.

  2. Stay On Topic:

item.title: Elements
item.description:
Table of Contents
  1. Heading 2
    1. Heading 3
      1. Heading 4
        1. Heading 5
    2. Emphasis
    3. Button
    4. Link
    5. Paragraph
    6. Ordered List
    7. Unordered List
    8. Notice
    9. Tab
    10. Accordions
    11. Code and Syntax Highlighting
    12. Blockquote
    13. Tables
    14. Image
    15. Gallery
    16. Slider
    17. Youtube video
    18. Custom video

Here is an example of headings. You can use this heading by the following markdown rules. For example: use # for heading 1 and use ###### for heading 6.

Heading 1

Heading 2

Heading 3

Heading 4

Heading 5
Heading 6

Emphasis

The emphasis, aka italics, with asterisks or underscores.

item.title: Privacy policy
item.description:
Privacy policy of this website

Last updated May 24, 2025

This privacy notice, describes how and why we might collect, store, use, and/or share ("process") your information when you use our services ("Services"), such as when you:

  • Visit our website at gameandcode.com, or any website of ours that links to this privacy notice

  • Engage with us in other related ways, including any sales, marketing, or events

Questions or concerns? Reading this privacy notice will help you understand your privacy rights and choices. If you do not agree with our policies and practices, please do not use our Services. If you still have any questions or concerns, please contact us at contact@gameandcode.com
